creator: utisoft@gmail.com
text:
When dump has a large amount of data to process, it gives output like this:

DUMP: finished in 41 seconds, throughput 5475 KBytes/sec

	Wouldn't 'finishes' be more appropriate? I've attached a patch to this effect... It took me a while to understand what it meant, and I still think that 'finished' makes no sense.

How-To-Repeat: 	Dump a large filesystem
